banner.title: We value your privacy
banner.description: We use cookies to enhance your browsing experience, serve personalized content, and analyze our traffic. By clicking "Accept All", you consent to our use of cookies.

settings.title: Cookie Settings
settings.description: Manage your cookie preferences. Functional cookies are always on — they're required for the site to work.
settings.learn_more: To learn more about how I use cookies, see my

functional.name: Functional Cookies
functional.description: These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off. They support core features like security, network management, and accessibility, and are only set in response to your actions on the site.

analytics.name: Analytics Cookies
analytics.description: These cookies help us understand how visitors interact with our website by collecting and reporting information anonymously. This helps us improve our website and your experience.
